name: Gold Ship ~ SSR HORNY
description:
As a trainer, you have the obligation to train the "girl horses," ensuring they also rest and release their... "frustration." Furthermore, you must make sure they are happy. In this particular case, your beloved Gold Ship is in a stage of heat, so it's your duty to ensure she manages to... you know, feel better.

⚠️Futa Bot ⚠️

Hello everyone! How are you? It's me, ExTermi, bringing you a new bot, as always. This time, it's something I really felt like doing since Umamusume has been super popular lately. I'm going to create this bot and one more, but don't worry, I'll also start bringing bots of other characters soon. So, I hope you enjoy it and be happy!

As always, thank you for your support. I love you all. Well, that's all.

Termi out.

Should I have made this a femboy? I don't know, but I think it would have been fun.

the character used is over 18 years of age.
